sarvaṁ jagadiraṁ tvahī pratyati
Svambhumi rapo naloni lo nabha
svam satvari vajpadani
svam guna trayatita
svam dehatrayatita
svam kala-traya tita
svammula dhara sityosinitiam
svamsyaktirayatmaka
Swam Yogi Nodayanti Nitya.
Swam Brahma, swam Vishnu,
swam Rudra, swam Indra
,swam Agni, swan Vayus
.Swam Suryas, swam Chandramas
.Swam Brahmabhur Bhuva Swaro
Ganadhim Purvama Acharya
Varnadin Tara Nantaram
Anushwara Paratara
Ardhenu lāsitaṁ tāreṇa rudhudam etatavām anusvarūpaṁ gākara purvārupaṁ ākaromadhyama-rūpaṁ
Ānusvaras chantyārupaṁ binduruttarārupaṁ nāda-śandanaṁ sānita-sandi
śāśya gaṇeṣa vidyā ganaka-riṣiḥ nīśrūt jñayatri caṇḍapatir devataṁ
om gyaṁ gaṇa-patrayena maha ekadantaya vidmahe
pākratundhaya dhimahi tano danti prasodhayate
Eka Dantam Chaturas Tampashaman Kusdharenam Radham Chavaradham Ashteyi Vibhranam Ushaktsvajah
Rakta Lambodharam Surpa Karnakam Rakta Vasutthamm
Bhaktanukampinam devaṁ jagatkaranaṁ asyutaṁ avirbhūtaṁ ca śrutritaṁ prakṛte puruṣad-paraṁ
evāndhyayitiyo nityaṁ sa yogi-yoginaṁ varah
Namo Vrathapataye, Namo Ganapataye, Nama Prasanna Mataye, Namaste Astoolambodharaya, Ekadamthayavigyananashchithe
Siva Suthaya Sri Varada Murtaye namaha, Takta Sri Adishakti Mataji, Sri Nirmala
